lead_signal.headline: No significant FIMI operations identified across monitored actors this week.
lead_signal.confidence_basis: Exhaustive search of Tier 1-3 sources yielded no new disclosures or attributions within the past 7 days.
lead_signal.note: Search results unrelated to FIMI (Foreign Information Manipulation & Interference); references pertain to Malaysian film incentives.

weekly_brief_narrative: No lead FIMI developments reported this week across Tier 1-3 sources. Searches of Meta CIB, Google TAG, Microsoft MSTIC, EUvsDisinfo, US State GEC, Stanford IO, DisinfoLab, EDMO, DFRLab, ASPI ICPC, and Bellingcat returned zero new attributions, takedowns, or campaigns involving Russia, China, Iran, Gulf states, US, or Israel from March 27 to April 2, 2026. Actor postures remain unchanged from prior monitoring: all at MONITORING absent fresh signals. Platform enforcement absent announcements; no takedowns or reports released. Notable gap in X/Twitter coverage persists due to lack of CIB-equivalent disclosures. Search artifacts referenced Malaysian Film In Malaysia Incentive (FIMI) rebates for Netflix's 6 Underground VFX and other productions, confirming no overlap with FIMI cognitive warfare scope. Coverage structurally thin for Gulf/US/Israel actors per OSINT limitations. Absence of activity signals potential dormancy or undetected operations; continued monitoring advised.

research_coverage.x_twitter_gap_note: No CIB-equivalent disclosures available; absence does not confirm inactivity.
